title: US Navy plans for 'Air Wing of the Future' with next-generation, pilotless carrier-based 1,150-mile-range drones to fly alongside manned aircraft
summary: The US Navy has issued a Request for Information (RFI) seeking a new family of carrier-based drones which would operate alongside manned aircraft while supporting missions across the full range of naval combat operations.
caption: output/2026-07-21/us-navy-plans-for-air-wing-of-the-future-with-next-generation-pilotles.txt
